nodes.name: 太平洋文鸟
nodes.summary: 太平洋文鸟（Lonchura melaena）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如太平洋文鸟。

nodes.name: 太平洋文鸟
nodes.summary: The buff-bellied mannikin (Lonchura melaena), also known as the sooty munia or Bismarck munia, is a species of estrildid finch found in New Britain and Buka Island. It has an estimated global extent of occurrence of 20,000 to 50,000 km2. It is found in subtropical and tropical dry grassland habitat. The status of the species is evaluated as Least Concern. References BirdLife Species Factsheet

nodes.name: Lonchura
nodes.summary: Lonchura（Lonchura）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联27种鸟类，如斑文鳥、红胸文鸟、黑脸文鸟等27种鸟类。
